disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Thailand declares Hantavirus “dangerous communicable disease; approves strict measures for compliance - News On AIR
updates.body_en: Thailand declares Hantavirus “dangerous communicable disease; approves strict measures for compliance News On AIR
updates.summary_zh: 泰国将汉坦病毒列为危险传染病，批准严格防控措施。

updates.title_en: These are the 10 U.S. states monitoring for hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship at center of outbreak - Yahoo
updates.body_en: These are the 10 U.S. states monitoring for hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship at center of outbreak Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: 美国10个州监测与邮轮疫情相关的汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: LIVE: WHO gives update on hantavirus as 6 passengers arrive in Australia for 3-week quarantine - KJCT
updates.body_en: LIVE: WHO gives update on hantavirus as 6 passengers arrive in Australia for 3-week quarantine KJCT
updates.summary_zh: WHO更新汉坦病毒情况，6名乘客抵达澳大利亚接受3周隔离。

updates.title_en: WHO chief takes questions about hantavirus, global health issues - CBC
updates.body_en: WHO chief takes questions about hantavirus, global health issues CBC
updates.summary_zh: WHO负责人回答关于汉坦病毒和全球健康问题。

updates.title_en: M/V Hondius — Atlantic Odyssey: Tracking the First Andes Hantavirus Outbreak at Sea - World Health Network
updates.body_en: M/V Hondius — Atlantic Odyssey: Tracking the First Andes Hantavirus Outbreak at Sea World Health Network
updates.summary_zh: 追踪安第斯山脉首次汉坦病毒海上暴发。

updates.title_en: More Americans Exposed To Hantavirus; 41 Under Monitoring, Says CDC - Health and Me
updates.body_en: More Americans Exposed To Hantavirus; 41 Under Monitoring, Says CDC Health and Me
updates.summary_zh: CDC 称更多美国人接触汉坦病毒，41 人接受监测。

updates.title_en: No known cases of hantavirus in U.S. as officials monitor 41 with possible exposure - NBC News
updates.body_en: No known cases of hantavirus in U.S. as officials monitor 41 with possible exposure NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 美国无已知汉坦病毒病例，官员监测 41 名可能接触者。

updates.title_en: Thailand Declares Hantavirus A 'Dangerous Communicable Disease', Activates Elevated Action Plan - NDTV
updates.body_en: Thailand Declares Hantavirus A 'Dangerous Communicable Disease', Activates Elevated Action Plan NDTV
updates.summary_zh: 泰国将汉坦病毒列为危险传染病，启动升级行动计划。

updates.title_en: CDC Says There Are Now No Known Hantavirus Cases in the US - TODAY.com
updates.body_en: CDC Says There Are Now No Known Hantavirus Cases in the US TODAY.com
updates.summary_zh: CDC 称美国目前无已知汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: More than 36 Americans being monitored for potential exposure to hantavirus - CBS News
updates.body_en: More than 36 Americans being monitored for potential exposure to hantavirus CBS News
updates.summary_zh: 超过 36 名美国人因可能接触汉坦病毒被监测。

updates.title_en: 6 passengers from hantavirus-hit ship arrive in Australia for 3-week quarantine - Udayavani
updates.body_en: 6 passengers from hantavirus-hit ship arrive in Australia for 3-week quarantine Udayavani
updates.summary_zh: 6名汉坦病毒邮轮乘客抵达澳大利亚，隔离3周。

updates.title_en: Major Wales hantavirus outbreak update as authorities confirm 'serious infection' - Daily Express
updates.body_en: Major Wales hantavirus outbreak update as authorities confirm 'serious infection' Daily Express
updates.summary_zh: 威尔士当局确认汉坦病毒严重感染，发布疫情更新。

updates.title_en: Australian passengers evacuated from hantavirus-hit cruise ship begin isolation - India Today
updates.body_en: Australian passengers evacuated from hantavirus-hit cruise ship begin isolation India Today
updates.summary_zh: 澳大利亚乘客从汉坦病毒邮轮撤离后开始隔离。
